title: hieracium sparsum subsp. mirekii
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. mirekii, also known as Hieracium mirekii, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion genus and is a type of hawkweed. It is used in traditional medicine, and its medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. mirekii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Hieracium sparsum subsp. mirekii are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
